name: Mod Forge Ultimate
desc: The ultimate EET mega-install — 400+ mods with 2045 components. Every category reviewed with component-level conflict resolution.
author: Infinity Mod Forge
installNotes: This build uses Infinity Mod Runner's patch system to resolve cross-mod conflicts that the Forge flags as hard conflicts (the scary red ones). Manual WeiDU install without those patches will likely fail or produce a broken install. Install via the Runner for a clean, tested result.

name: Cross-Platform Story
desc: Story Expansion for Mac and Linux. Quests, NPCs, and romances without EEex or Windows-only mods.
author: Infinity Mod Forge
